source.description:
The Windows 10 WinRT API Pack enables you to add the latest Windows Runtime APIs support to your .NET Framework 4.5+ and .NET Core 3.0+ libraries and apps.
       
This package includes all the supported Windows Runtime APIs up to Windows 10 version . If you are targeting earlier platforms, consider only offering functionality available on the detected platform version. For further details, see:
https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/uwp/debug-test-perf/version-adaptive-code

    Supported platforms:
    - .NET Framework 4.5+
    - .NET Core 3.0+

Requires default package management format set to PackageReference, and NuGet 4.0 or higher.
source.tags: managed WinRT WinForms WPF SDK WindowsSDK
